code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about an athlete (or related entities) into a single fluent sentence."""
    # Simple template mapping for supported predicates
    templates = {
        "league": "{s} plays in the {o} league",
        "manager": "{s} is managed by {o}",
        "position": "{s} holds the position of {o}",
        "ground": "{s}'s ground is {o}",
        "birthDate": "{s} was born on {o}",
        "birthPlace": "{s} was born in {o}",
        "birthYear": "{s} was born in {o}",
        "club": "{s} plays for {o}",
        "draftTeam": "{s} was drafted by {o}",
        "height": "{s} is {o} meters tall",
        "youthclub": "{s} started at youth club {o}",
        "currentclub": "{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "weight": "{s} weighs {o}",
        "deathPlace": "{s} died in {o}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": "{s} started his active years in {o}",
        "currentteam": "{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "debutTeam": "{s} debuted with {o}",
        "draftPick": "{s} was pick number {o}",
        "draftRound": "{s} was selected in round {o}",
        "formerTeam": "{s} formerly played for {o}",
        "playerNumber": "{s}'s player number is {o}",
        "college": "{s} attended {o}",
        "draftYear": "{s} was drafted in {o}",
        "coach": "{s} is coached by {o}",
        "owner": "{s} is owned by {o}",
        "city": "{s} is based in {o}",
        "leader": "{s} is led by {o}",
        "anthem": "The anthem of {s} is {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": "{s} has ethnic group {o}",
        "language": "The language of {s} is {o}",
        "generalManager": "{s}'s general manager is {o}",
        "chairman": "The chairman of {s} is {o}",
        "season": "{s} participated in the {o} season",
        "currency": "The currency of {s} is {o}",
        "demonym": "The demonym for {s} is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": "The official language of {s} is {o}",
        "stadium": "The stadium of {s} is {o}",
        "universityTeam": "{s}'s university team is {o}",
        "mostChampions": "The team with most championships in {s} is {o}",
        "leaderTitle": "The leader title of {s} is {o}",
        "isPartOf": "{s} is part of {o}",
        "country": "{s} is in {o}",
        "utcOffset": "The UTC offset of {s} is {o}",
        "timeZone": "The time zone of {s} is {o}",
        "areaTotal": "The total area of {s} is {o}",
        "foundingDate": "{s} was founded on {o}",
    }

    phrases = []
    for t in triples:
        tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate, None)
        if tmpl:
            phrases.append(tmpl.format(s=t.subject, o=t.object))
        else:
            # Fallback generic phrasing
            phrases.append(f"{t.subject} {t.predicate} {t.object}")

    if not phrases:
        return ""

    if len(phrases) == 1:
        sentence = phrases[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
